sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS MACHINES CORP의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 1분기 매출은 159억 달러로 전년 대비 불변환율 기준 6% 성장했으며, 소프트웨어 11%, 인프라 15% 성장이 전체를 이끌었다.
비GAAP 희석 EPS 1.91달러, GAAP 희석 EPS 1.28달러를 기록했다.
CEO Arvind Krishna는 전 세그먼트에 걸친 광범위한 성장과 함께 AI가 글로벌 사업의 순풍으로 작용하고 있다고 언급했으며, 2026년 연간 불변환율 기준 매출 성장 5% 이상 전망을 유지했다.

riskChanges.text: 환율 영향이 성장에 일정 부분 반영되어 있어 달러 강세 지속 시 보고 매출에 하방 압력이 발생할 수 있다.

businessChanges.text: 소프트웨어 세그먼트(Red Hat 포함)는 두 자릿수 성장했으며, 자동화 10%, 데이터 16% 성장이 두드러졌다.
인프라 세그먼트 매출 33억 달러로 15% 성장했고, 하이브리드 인프라는 28% 급증했으며 IBM Z는 51% 성장해 차세대 메인프레임 수요가 강세를 보였다.
컨설팅 세그먼트 매출 53억 달러로 완만한 성장에 그쳐 상대적으로 부진했다.

financialHighlights.text: GAAP 매출총이익률은 100포인트 개선, 비GAAP 매출총이익률은 110포인트 개선되며 마진이 확대됐다.
비GAAP 세전이익률 13.4%, GAAP 세전이익률 8.7%(80포인트 개선)을 기록했다.
연간 잉여현금흐름은 전년 대비 약 10억 달러 증가할 것으로 경영진이 전망했다.

watchItems.text: 소프트웨어(특히 Red Hat·자동화)와 인프라의 고성장이 컨설팅 둔화를 상쇄하는 구조가 지속될지 주목된다.
AI 생성형 비즈니스 수주 잔고 확대 추이와 함께, 연간 5% 이상 성장 유지 가능성이 핵심 관전 포인트다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 ibm-20260422xex991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 IBM RELEASES FIRST-QUARTER RESULTS Double-digit Software and Infrastructure revenue growth; Strong margin expansion and double-digit profit and free cash flow growth ARMONK, N.Y., April 22, 2026 . . . IBM (NYSE: IBM) today announced first-quarter 2026 earnings results. “The first quarter was a strong start to the year with broad-based revenue growth across our segments. These results reflect the integrated value of our portfolio and the trust clients put in us to improve their operations. As clients scale use cases, AI continues to be a tailwind for our global business. IBM products and services are helping clients orchestrate, deploy and govern AI across hybrid environments," said Arvind Krishna, IBM chairman, president and chief executive officer. "Given this strong start, we continue to expect more than 5 percent constant  Normalized numeric aliases: 5 percent = 5%.

currency revenue growth and an increase of about $1 billion in year-over-year free cash flow in 2026.” First-Quarter Highlights • Revenue – Revenue of $15.9 billion, up 9 percent, up 6 percent at constant currency – Software revenue up 11 percent, up 8 percent at constant currency – Consulting revenue up 4 percent, up 1 percent at constant currency – Infrastructure revenue up 15 percent, up 12 percent at constant currency • Profit – Gross Profit Margin: GAAP: 56.2 percent, up 100 basis points; Operating (Non-GAAP): 57.7 percent, up 110 basis points – Pre-Tax Income Margin: GAAP: 8.7 percent, up 80 basis points; Operating (Non-GAAP):  Normalized numeric aliases: $1 billion = 10억 달러; $15.9 billion = 159억 달러; $5.2 billion = 52억 달러; $2.2 billion = 22억 달러; $1 = 1달러; $15.9 = 15.9달러; $5.2 = 5.2달러; $2.2 = 2.2달러; 6 percent = 6%; 15 percent = 15%; 13.4 percent = 13.4%; 8.7 percent = 8.7%; 100 basis points = 100포인트; 110 basis points = 110포인트; 80 basis points = 80포인트; 140 basis points = 140포인트.

Margin Net Income Diluted Earnings Per Share GAAP from Continuing Operations $ 15.9B $ 8.9B 56.2 % $ 1.4B 8.7 % $ 1.2B $ 1.28 Year/Year 9 % (1) 11 % 1.0 Pts 20 % 0.8 Pts 15 % 14 % Operating (Non-GAAP) $ 9.2B 57.7 % $ 2.1B 13.4 % $ 1.8B $ 1.91 Year/Year 12 % 1.1 Pts 23 % 1.4 Pts 20 % 19 % (1) 6% at constant currency. “Our solid revenue growth, portfolio mix and productivity initiatives drove double-digit profit and free cash flow growth in the quarter," said James Kavanaugh, IBM senior vice president and chief financial officer. "The durability of our portfolio combined with our disciplined execution continues to give us the financial flexibility needed to both invest in our business and return value to shareholders through our dividend.” Segment Results for  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.1 billion = 71억 달러; $15.9 = 15.9달러; $8.9 = 8.9달러; $1.4 = 1.4달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $1.28 = 1.28달러; $9.2 = 9.2달러; $2.1 = 2.1달러; $1.91 = 1.91달러; $1.8 = 1.8달러; $7.1 = 7.1달러; 11 percent = 11%; 8 percent = 8%.

13 percent, up 10 percent at constant currency – Automation up 10 percent, up 7 percent at constant currency – Data up 19 percent, up 16 percent at constant currency – Transaction Processing up 6 percent, up 2 percent at constant currency • Consulting — revenues of $5.3 billion, up 4 percent, up 1 percent at constant currency: – Strategy and Technology up 4 percent, up 1 percent at constant currency – Intelligent Operations up 4 percent, up 1 percent at constant currency • Infrastructure — revenues of $3.3 billion, up 15 percent, up 12 percent at constant currency: – Hybrid Infrastructure up 28 percent, up 25 percent at constant currency • IBM Z up 51 percent, up 48 percent at  Normalized numeric aliases: $5.3 billion = 53억 달러; $3.3 billion = 33억 달러; $5.3 = 5.3달러; $3.3 = 3.3달러; $0.2 = 0.2달러; 13 percent = 13%; 10 percent = 10%; 7 percent = 7%; 16 percent = 16%; 15 percent = 15%; 48 percent = 48%; 12 percent = 12%; 28 percent = 28%; 25 percent = 25%; 51 percent = 51%; 17 percent = 17%.
